creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#network-nis>

I'm fairly sure that it's correct to write (and say), as already in the book: "an NIS domain"; "an NIS server"; "an NIS client"

–     an
– not a

Please see, for example, <https://community.broadcom.com/symantecenterprise/communities/community-home/librarydocuments/viewdocument?DocumentKey=1e3cab2f-94cd-4487-a810-fbb863b44954&CommunityKey=1ecf5f55-9545-44d6-b0f4-4e4a7f5f5e68&tab=librarydocuments> (some phrases that include NFS; others that include NIS).
